item.title: Integration + provider management + roles
item.intent: Deliver integration, provider, and role management so users add services and govern access through commands, not config file edits.
item.description: INTEGRATION MANAGEMENT: As agents grow (Month 1-6 story), users add integrations. Integration management makes this clean vs. ad-hoc file editing. Provider abstraction means credential routing is automatic. Identity governance (roles) matters for Fleet Operator persona managing agents for multiple people. Acceptance: 'clawhq integrate' connects new service with live validation; 'clawhq provider' manages cloud API routing; role definitions control what each integration can access.
steps: Implement 'clawhq integrate' for connecting new services with live validation
Implement 'clawhq provider' for cloud API credential routing
Implement 'clawhq role' for identity governance and access control
acceptanceCriteria: 'clawhq integrate' connects service with live validation
'clawhq provider' manages cloud API routing correctly
Role definitions control what each integration can access
